phaseA.notes: Merged 2026-04-30 via squash. CI green. Worktree at aHand/.worktrees/browser-setup-progress-api is retained but branch was deleted remotely + rebased commits no longer on local tracking branch.

phaseB.notes: Worktree + pnpm install already done. No Phase-B task work started yet; resume by dispatching Task 8's implementer. team9-agent-pi's ahandd-SDK-side CloudClient.browser() removal is noted in Task 9 Step 6 Option A — we chose @deprecated JSDoc in the aHand repo (NOT delete); it's a follow-up commit to Phase A, not a Phase-B dependency.

phaseC.notes: After Phase B merges, bump team9 Tauri's ahandd.rev to 5972ef2 (or whatever Phase-B merge SHA if SDK deprecation is bundled there), and @team9claw/* pins to Phase-B published versions. Task 13 Step 1 has the exact Cargo.toml line to update.

tasks.subject: Task 1: aHand — extend browser_setup/types.rs with LogStream, ErrorCode, Phase::Log, CheckStatus::Failed
tasks.description:
**Repo:** aHand. **Goal:** Add new type surface (LogStream, ErrorCode, Phase::Log, ProgressEvent.stream, CheckStatus::Failed) with round-trip serde tests. Type-only change.

**Files:**
- Modify: aHand: crates/ahandd/src/browser_setup/types.rs

**Verify:** `cd /Users/winrey/Projects/weightwave/aHand && cargo test -p ahandd browser_setup::types && cargo fmt -p ahandd -- --check && cargo clippy -p ahandd --all-targets -- -D warnings`

```json:metadata
{"files":["aHand/crates/ahandd/src/browser_setup/types.rs"],"verifyCommand":"cd /Users/winrey/Projects/weightwave/aHand && cargo test -p ahandd browser_setup::types && cargo fmt -p ahandd -- --check && cargo clippy -p ahandd --all-targets -- -D warnings","acceptanceCriteria":["LogStream + ErrorCode enums with snake_case serde","Phase::Log variant added","ProgressEvent.stream: Option<LogStream> with skip_serializing_if","CheckStatus::Failed { code, message } variant added","existing serde tests unchanged","new serde tests cover all new surface"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: aHand — classify_error + FailedStepReport newtype; wrap ensure() calls
tasks.description:
**Repo:** aHand. **Goal:** Add centralized error classifier + FailedStepReport wrapper so install failures surface structured info through anyhow::Error chain. Wrap run_all/run_step's ensure() calls with catch-and-classify.

**Files:**
- Modify: aHand: crates/ahandd/src/browser_setup/mod.rs

**Verify:** `cargo test -p ahandd browser_setup && cargo clippy`

```json:metadata
{"files":["aHand/crates/ahandd/src/browser_setup/mod.rs"],"verifyCommand":"cd /Users/winrey/Projects/weightwave/aHand && cargo test -p ahandd browser_setup && cargo fmt -p ahandd -- --check && cargo clippy -p ahandd --all-targets -- -D warnings","acceptanceCriteria":["classify_error returns right ErrorCode per pattern (EACCES/network/etc)","FailedStepReport newtype with Display+Debug+Error impls","run_all/run_step wrap ensure() failures into FailedStepReport via context","terminal Phase::Done ProgressEvent emitted on failure before Err return","halt-on-failure: later steps not run after a step fails","classify_error walks cause chain via {:#} formatter"]}
```
